failure_mode: Request timeout (60s) — no response from REST endpoints
root_cause: The BindingDB REST API endpoints (/getLigandsByUniprot, /getLigandsByUniprots, /getLigandsByPDBs, /getTargetByCompound) hang indefinitely. The BindingDB website (bindingdb.org) itself returns HTTP 200, but the REST API path does not respond within 60s. Likely an overloaded or decommissioned REST tier.
retry_notes: Try GET https://www.bindingdb.org/rest/getLigandsByUniprot?uniprot=P35354;100&response=application/json — if it responds within 60s the API is back.
workaround: Use ChEMBL API (chembl_tool.py) for compound-target binding affinity data, or PubChem BioAssay for ligand activity data.
